column1: # roborepo install manifest — single source of truth for managed home<->repo paths.
# Hand-duplicated across 7+ scripts before this file existed (install/main.sh,
#   harness   claude | codex | agents        which harness this row belongs to
#   kind      link | root_config | cleanup    behavior (see below)
#   src_rel   path under repo root, or "-" for cleanup rows (no repo source)
#   home_sub  path relative to the harness home dir (claude=~/.claude, codex=~/.codex,
#             agents=~/.agents); the reader joins the home root
#   home_root home dir token: claude=~/.claude  codex=~/.codex  agents=~/.agents
#               nodoctor  = not checked by doctor --installed (verify still checks)
#               nosync    = not pulled from live home config by sync-from-home.sh
#   link         clean symlink home_sub -> repo/src_rel (link_item_clean / check_link)
#   root_config  mutable user state: copied not linked, adopt-on-collision
#   cleanup      remove a stale repo-managed symlink at home path; src_rel is "-"
